name: Crusade Automated Defense System
desc: Military facilities that automatically replicate the Crusader Plan standard automatic ships give the entity where they are located powerful space defense capabilities.

name: Crusade Deep Space Mining System
desc: The deep space mining system uses autonomous fleets to mine possible mineral resources in all galaxies within 35 light years, providing the mothership with a steady stream of industrial raw materials.

name: Red Stripe Knights 1st Guard Regiment Anchorage
desc: Maintains a Guard fleet dedicated to system defense and containing the flagship of the Order's armed forces.

name: Red Stripe Knights 2nd Guard Regiment Anchorage
desc: Maintained an extremely powerful Guards fleet.

name: Red Stripe Knights 3rd Guard Regiment Anchorage
desc: It maintains an extremely powerful Guards fleet; a powerful military fleet whose main task is to install experimental equipment.
